properties.description: The space is open to all. Cuppa and Company session: Every Friday 10:00am - 12 noon
properties.title: Bridport Library

properties.description: We are open Monday 10-5pm, Tuesday 10-5pm, Wednesday 10-6pm, Thursday 10-5pm, Friday 10-5pm, Saturday 10-4pm We welcome anyone to come and enjoy our warm spaces. Find a quiet corner to work, study or read. Or join in with one of our many free activities for all ages to create something, learn something, write something, read with a group, play games or just have a drink, chat and make connections with others at our Coffee companions sessions. Computer use is free. What’s on in Dorset libraries https://www.dorsetcouncil.gov.uk/whats-on-in-dorset-libraries
properties.title: Bridport Library

properties.description: The cafe is open to all within the community whether you are involved in sport at Redlands or just getting out and about. We have a 5's and under soft play area too for the children and lots of things you can engage with if you wish.
properties.title: Redlands Community Cafe
